subject: docs(ai-notes): add cross-repo access pattern for sibling repos
body:
Document that AI assistants should use raw.githubusercontent.com URLs
to read files from sibling devmade-ai repos, never clone them.

Tags: documentation, ai-notes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cors-management
Semver: patch

title: add cross-repo access pattern for sibling repos
